headline: Is Republic Services, Inc. (RSG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is RSG a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Republic Services, Inc. on Ocular Capital’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on RSG. Republic Services, Inc.’s share was trading at $225.78 as of March 12th. RSG’s trailing and forward P/E were 32.67 and 30.67 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]

headline: Invesco Rising Dividends Fund Q4 2025 Portfolio Activity
